tweet.text: I disagree. While he was unsuccessful with his TD’s vs Aldo, he is generally quite successful with his attempts, doesn’t get hit too much and stays quite busy with his striking in the clinch and on the ground. https://t.co/vvwJTvNCDL
Oh dang, I missed this @Jon_Anik …best in the BIZ! Consistency, talent, hard work and dedication. 🐐 https://t.co/5ouOl15k44

There is a built-in vulnerability to staying active at the high levels of mma. Stay active, make more money. Stay active, injuries, fatigue, stunted growth can catch up to you etc. So far so good for Pereira however but I would strongly suggest that a nice respite is required. https://t.co/bnejLe4sK9
